title: Probe findings
description: Machine-readable output of the /probe exploratory-testing skill: the app under test, when the run happened, and every recorded finding.

app.description: Name or path of the application that was probed.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the probe run completed.

coverage.description: Optional record of which feature flows x dimensions were probed.

findings.description: Every surprise or bug recorded by the probe agents, after the verify pass.

dimension.description: Quality lens the finding was probed under.

severity.description: Impact of the finding if left unaddressed.

id.description: Stable identifier, e.g. F-001. Assigned during the verify/report pass.

flow.description: User-facing feature flow the finding belongs to, derived from the specs.

title.description: One-line summary of the surprise or bug.

description.description: What was expected vs what actually happened, and why it matters.

repro.description: Concrete, ordered steps to reproduce the finding.

evidence.description: Observed output, error text, log line, response body, or file:line pointer.

verified.description: True once the adversarial verify pass confirmed the finding is real (not a false positive).

confidence.description: Verifier confidence that the finding is a genuine defect (0..1).
